category_sources: source_facts.description says "Hook preloader"; official GitHub README says ProxyChains hooks network-related libc functions and redirects connections through SOCKS/HTTP proxies.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is proxychains-ng; official repository is rofl0r/proxychains-ng.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes installation, configuration, usage examples, and known problems.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/rofl0r/proxychains-ng, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists proxychains4; official README describes SOCKS4a/5 and HTTP proxy chaining via LD_PRELOAD.
